_comment: Fairfax County Employees' Retirement System (FCERS/ERS). Fully independent defined benefit pension system (not VRS). Established 1955. Covers general county employees and certain FCPS non-teaching positions (bus drivers, cafeteria, clerical, custodians, trades). Five plan tiers (A-E) based on hire date and contribution election. Update as Fairfax County Code changes.

jurisdiction.note: FCERS is a fully independent single-employer defined benefit pension system established 1955 (originally Supplemental Retirement System). It is NOT part of VRS. Covers general Fairfax County government employees and certain Fairfax County Public Schools (FCPS) non-teaching employees. Governed by Fairfax County Code Chapter 3 (Retirement).

hireDateMapping.label: ERS Plan A (pre-2013, integrated contribution)
hireDateMapping.note: County/FCPS employees hired before 1/1/2013 who elected Plan A (4% up to SS wage base + 5.333% above). Plans A and B were available; employee selected one at hire. CLOSED to new members.

hireDateMapping.label: ERS Plan B (pre-2013, flat contribution)
hireDateMapping.note: County/FCPS employees hired before 1/1/2013 who elected Plan B (flat 5.333%). Plans A and B were available; employee selected one at hire. CLOSED to new members.

hireDateMapping.label: ERS Plan C (2013-2019, integrated contribution)
hireDateMapping.note: County/FCPS employees hired 1/1/2013 through 6/30/2019 who elected Plan C (4% up to SS wage base + 5.333% above). Plans C and D were available; employee selected one at hire. CLOSED to new members.

hireDateMapping.label: ERS Plan D (2013-2019, flat contribution)
hireDateMapping.note: County/FCPS employees hired 1/1/2013 through 6/30/2019 who elected Plan D (flat 5.333%). Plans C and D were available; employee selected one at hire. CLOSED to new members.

hireDateMapping.label: ERS Plan E (2019+, flat contribution)
hireDateMapping.note: County/FCPS employees hired on or after 7/1/2019. Single plan — no choice between integrated/flat. OPEN to new members.

fcers_plan_a.statusNote: Closed to new members as of 1/1/2013. Existing members retain Plan A provisions.

preSocialSecurityBenefit.description: 1.0% × FAS × Years of Benefit Service × 1.03. Paid from retirement until age 65.

formula.ssBreakpointNote: Social Security Breakpoint (average of SS taxable wage bases for 35 years before age 65) is used in the Plan A benefit formula and Pre-SS Benefit computation.
formula.description: Base benefit = 1.8% × FAS × Years × 1.03. Pre-SS benefit = 1.0% × FAS × Years × 1.03 (temporary, paid until age 65). Total benefit at retirement = Base + Pre-SS.

conditions.description: Age 50 with 30+ years of eligibility service
Age + years of eligibility service ≥ 80 (at any time after age 50)
Age 50 with 25+ years of eligibility service
Age + years of eligibility service ≥ 75 (at any time after age 50)

earlyRetirement.reductionNote: Base benefit only (no Pre-SS benefit). Reduced based on age at early retirement — the younger from age 65, the greater the reduction. Consult ERS Active Employee Handbook for reduction schedule.

deferredVested.note: Terminate employment, leave contributions in system, receive benefit at age 65. Base benefit formula applies; no Pre-SS benefit.

employee.note: 4% of salary up to SS Maximum Wage Base, then 5⅓% of compensation above SS wage base.

contributions.employerNote: Employer contribution rate set by annual actuarial valuation, approximately 28-31%.

cola.note: FCERS benefits do not include an automatic COLA. Benefit adjustments require Board of Supervisors action.

jobRelated.formula: 66⅔% of FAS less Workers' Compensation payments

drop.note: Deferred Retirement Option Program — up to 3 years. Monthly benefit credited to DROP account while continuing to work. Applications must be received 60+ days prior to DROP entry date.

sickLeaveCredit.note: Accrued sick leave may be converted to additional benefit service. For employees hired on/after 1/1/2013, capped at 2,080 hours.

survivorOptions.label: Refund of contributions and interest (pre-retirement death)

servicePurchase.note: Buy-back of prior service. Within 12 months of re-employment: 7.25% interest. After 12 months: 15% interest. Must complete within 3 years.

fcers_plan_b.statusNote: Closed to new members as of 1/1/2013. Existing members retain Plan A provisions.

preSocialSecurityBenefit.description: 1.0% × FAS × Years of Benefit Service × 1.03. Paid from retirement until age 65.

formula.ssBreakpointNote: SS Breakpoint not used in Plan B base benefit formula, but IS used in Pre-SS Benefit computation.

baseBenefit.description: 2.0% × FAS × Years of Benefit Service (no 1.03 escalator)

formula.ssBreakpointNote: Not applicable — Plan E has no Pre-Social Security Benefit and no SS Breakpoint integration.
formula.description: Base benefit = 2.0% × FAS × Years. No Pre-Social Security Benefit. No 1.03 escalator.
